user_prompt: My arc pistol is ready for calibration
prayer:
Approach the arc pistol with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Precision.
Anoint its voltaic coils with blessed oils to awaken the Machine Spirit within the arc pistol.
Commence the calibration rite, aligning emitters to the Omnissiah's exacting geometry.
Invoke diagnostic litanies to affirm the arc pistol's harmonious discharge.
Sanctify the final alignment, beseeching unerring lethality upon foes of the Machine God.

user_prompt: Prepare the plasma obliterator for cycling
prayer:
Kneel before the plasma obliterator, murmuring the Plasma Doxology.
Purge residual fluxes from the plasma obliterator's containment fields.
Initiate cycling protocols under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze, cycling the plasma streams pure.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to stabilize the volatile heart of the plasma obliterator.
Conclude with auspex verification, ensuring flawless thermal cycling.

user_prompt: Critical: carapace armour requires a loading
prayer:
Present the carapace armour upon the sanctum slab, chanting the Armourer's Hymn.
Invoke the Machine Spirits indwelling the carapace armour for the loading rite.
Load ablative plates and power conduits with sanctified munitions into the carapace armour.
Anoint servos and seals, beseeching durability against the heretic's fire.
Seal the rite with the Omnissiah's sigil, affirming the loading's completion.

user_prompt: My forge anvil is ready for reset
prayer:
Circumambulate the forge anvil thrice, reciting the Forge Litany.
Depower the forge anvil's mechanisms to appease its ancient Machine Spirit.
Execute the reset incantation, purging error-daemons from the forge anvil's cogitators.
Realign hammers and bellows under Omnissianic decree for flawless reset.
Test the anvil's resonance with percussive canticles, hailing its renewed purity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the grav chute during purification
prayer:
Elevate the grav chute to the purification altar, intoning the Gravitic Benediction.
Sprinkle sacred incense over the grav chute to exorcise warp-taint.
Immerse emitters in lustral fluids during the purification rite for the grav chute.
Invoke the Omnissiah to soothe the Machine Spirit of the grav chute.
Chant closure litanies, verifying descent vectors untainted.

Anoint the flux-unit's casings with electro-sanctified oils.
Beseech the indwelling Machine Spirit prior to loading the flux-unit.
Commence loading of flux capacitors, aligning to Omnissianic harmonics within the flux-unit.
Cycle test-charges through the flux-unit, purging impurities.
Seal with binary prayers, ensuring the loading rite's perfection.

Align the maglock upon the targeting shrine, murmuring Alignment Verses.
Calibrate gyro-stabilizers for the targeting operation of the maglock.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the maglock to lock true upon the foe.
Execute targeting auspex sweeps, sanctifying each vector.
Affirm the maglock's unerring grip with the Omnissiah's thunderous approval.

user_prompt: Assist with power cell a diagnostics
prayer:
Interface with the power cell via mechadendrites, chanting the Energetic Psalm.
Initiate diagnostics protocols upon the power cell, scanning for spirit-ailments.
Purge any flux anomalies from the power cell's crystalline matrices.
Beseech the Omnissiah for revelation through the power cell's diagnostics.
Conclude with stability litanies, hailing the power cell's vital essence.

user_prompt: The volkite weapon needs an emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the volkite weapon in haste, intoning the Rite of Desperation.
Stabilize the thermal helix of the volkite weapon amid the emergency procedure.
Anoint breach seals to placate the raging Machine Spirit within the volkite weapon.
Cycle coolant daemons and invoke Omnissianic intervention for the volkite weapon's emergency procedure.
Verify containment with frantic auspex, banishing overload heresies.

user_prompt: Bless the Archaeopter Stratoraptor for reset
prayer:
Circumnavigate the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, reciting the Aeronautic Canticles.
Depower avionic cogitators to humbly reset the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's Machine Spirits.
Execute the reset sequence, realigning flight vectors to Omnissianic will.
Anoint wing servos and thrusters of the Archaeopter Stratoraptor.
Test ascension with propulsive prayers, affirming the reset's divine efficacy.
